---
title: "edda.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\edda.py"
loc: 130
complexity: 18
logic_score: 3.85
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 6.32
overall_score: 2.46
---

## Intent
The `edda.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on EddaWeaver, __init__, scan_and_transmute, _should_ignore, _transmute, _extract_title, _convert_syntax, replace_alert, _quarantine_file, synthesize_api, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via EddaWeaver, __init__, scan_and_transmute, _should_ignore, _transmute, _extract_title, _convert_syntax, replace_alert, _quarantine_file, synthesize_api, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [ast](file://ast)
- [re](file://re)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `EddaWeaver`
- `__init__`
- `scan_and_transmute`
- `_should_ignore`
- `_transmute`
- `_extract_title`
- `_convert_syntax`
- `replace_alert`
- `_quarantine_file`
- `synthesize_api`
- `main`
